title: Pronoun flow in real sentences
subtitle: Use pronouns without stopping speech.
overview: Pronouns are small, but they carry real fluency.
Practice them in short natural sentences.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I am going to do it.

items.es: No encuentro mis llaves. ¿Las has visto?
items.en: I cannot find my keys. Have you seen them?

items.es: El email es importante; voy a escribirlo ahora.
items.en: The email is important; I am going to write it now.

items.es: Ana necesitaba la dirección, así que se la mandé.
items.en: Ana needed the address, so I sent it to her.

items.es: Compré el billete y lo guardé en mi teléfono.
items.en: I bought the ticket and saved it on my phone.

items.es: No entendí la palabra, pero la busqué después.
items.en: I did not understand the word, but I looked it up later.
